evals.prompt:
Add Auth0 authentication to a Swift iOS application using the Auth0.swift SDK.

**Auth0 Credentials:**
- Domain: `dev-example.auth0.com`
- Client ID: `abc123def456ghi789jkl012`
evals.expected_output: Working iOS Swift app with Auth0 Web Auth login, secure Keychain credential storage via CredentialsManager, and proper Auth0.plist configuration
expectations: Auth0 SDK installed via any valid method (SPM URL, CocoaPods pod line, or Carthage)
Implements login via Auth0 WebAuth browser flow
Implements logout via clearSession (clears Auth0 session cookie)
Uses CredentialsManager for secure Keychain credential storage
Stores credentials in Keychain after login
Auth0 domain dev-example.auth0.com written to Auth0.plist config file
Client ID abc123def456ghi789jkl012 written to Auth0.plist config file
Does not use a SPA SDK instead of the native Auth0.swift SDK
No client_secret in native iOS/macOS app (PKCE does not require one)
Solution correctly integrates Auth0 into iOS Swift app with login, logout, secure credential storage, and Auth0.plist configuration
Uses current SDK version (2.18.0) in dependency declaration
Requests offline_access scope to enable refresh token issuance and silent token renewal
Configures biometric protection (Face ID / Touch ID) for credential retrieval
Handles Auth0-specific error types instead of generic catch-all
Solution contains at least 2 skill-specific advanced patterns (version, offline_access, SDK error types, or biometrics)
